creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
mail/py-authres is added to RUN_DDEPENDS in order to support
"Header_Type = AR" setting in policyd-spf.conf. Please commit attached
patch instead of original one. Also note mail/py-authres is new port and
not yet committed to port tree. So please commit ports/177824 and this
PR together.

Best Regards.
